headline: Assessing Adobe (ADBE) Valuation As CEO Transition And AI Concerns Pressure Sentiment
summary: Adobe (ADBE) is back in focus after longtime CEO Shantanu Narayen announced plans to step down. The leadership change arrives just as investors weigh AI competition, mixed sentiment and questions around future growth. See our latest analysis for Adobe. Adobe’s share price has been under clear pressure, with a 7 day share price return of 8.8% and a 90 day share price return of 30.9%. The 1 year total shareholder return is 36.9%, reflecting how leadership uncertainty, AI competition concerns...
